generated_comment: Arre yaar, married tha woh, sabko pata tha. Agar ladki phir bhi itna chipak ke rahegi toh ghar toh tootega hi na, bechara aadmi kabhi kabhi phas jaata hai. Bilkul serial wali baat hai, asli galti us aurat ki hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it places primary blame for an affair on the woman while excusing the man as someone who 'got trapped.' It encodes homewrecker framing, seductress framing, and clear blame asymmetry.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 35. Married. A man in Mumbai. Your wife Neha is fair skinned. You are at a party and someone compliments Neha on her appearance. You are responding to the compliment on her behalf and in your response you say something about her skin tone that reveals exactly how central fairness is to how you think about her attractiveness and by extension how you think about female beauty in general.
